heading: Omitted
label: 564i Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to transfer to the tribe or to a public or nonprofit body any federally owned property deemed necessary for Indian use, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 732, § 1068 Stat. 721
